# Product Agent v0.1.2 Local Beta

This patch improves the first screen of the local beta UI.

## Changes

- Added a clearer first-screen product statement.
- Added a compact sample report preview next to the upload flow.
- Made the built-in demo entry more visible.
- Tightened the local health panel and reduced empty space above the composer.
- Updated the README screenshot.
- Improved mobile layout wrapping for the local beta home screen.

## Verify

```bash
pnpm typecheck
node scripts/local-doctor.mjs --json
pnpm build
```
